testcase.name: gettransactionpayment_v4_false

YORK","State":"NY","ZipCode":"65342","Country":"USA"},"Customer":{"Id":"CUSTOMER016","Type":"Individual","Individual":{"FullName":"Mrs. Elizabeth R
